ksa_text: Skill in implementing AI application guardrails, including input validation, output filtering, safety classifiers, and human-in-the-loop intervention points.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-009 (AI and Machine Learning/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.396, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.396). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.396, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.396)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
